channel.title: .exe on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in .exe on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to install Windows softwares on Android using ExaGear Emulator.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-ooNtrIM0-P8/YoZ3d7w1OKI/AAAAAAAALE8/lUaaoZGxDo4mJN0b1ZTr-IIpNvpMN2uUACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1652979572058860-0.png" alt=""> It is well known fact we can’t play PC windows operating system apps on mobile operating systems like Android and iOS as both operating systems has different software and hardware with system limitations but thanks to emulators with them we can bypass limitations of operating systems and experience both softwares vice versa. However, few years back only windows and other desktop operating systems has numerous emulators like BlueStacks to install Android apps and games on PC but now there are few Emulators available for Android as well by using them you can install windows apps and games on Android but don’t expect full compatibility.

item.title: How to install windows and .exe softwares in android |
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-6ZDoLrTxcvQ/X2bumhgF8PI/AAAAAAAABqE/6glkUUjfgUsDmFvG0TlO9VVL96TaOvXmgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1600581270496390-0.png" alt=""> It is well known fact that you can’t run windows in android as both are different operating system’s but there are many ways that you can remote run windows or any OS or .exe softwares using this methods However, you won’t get butter smooth experience as you are not running windows or software in your android instead connecting to remote desktop that you installed. - Install windows softwares [ easily ]
